preamble: The palatalization and deaffrication of the voiceless velar lateral affricate [kʟ] into the voiceless postalveolar affricate [tʃ] is a historical development found in some Na-Dene dialects where complex lateral sounds simplified.

examples.note: Simplification of velar laterals toward common coronal affricates.

sources: Ladefoged, P., & Maddieson, I. (1996). The Sounds of the World's Languages.
